diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,144 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides Factory class with createHandlers interface for batching handlers, and createFactory/factory.createMiddleware for middleware creation
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper provides utilities to get matched routes and route paths from request context
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, defineWebSocketHelper, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, WSEvents
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides UpgradeWebSocket for creating WebSocket handlers with full WS context support
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie functions
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Neighbor files: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper provides testClient for creating test clients from Hono apps with custom fetch
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: ../../context
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper provides env function for accessing runtime-specific environment variables with runtime detection
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext, DefaultContextType, raw, rawCssString
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Neighbor files: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx, ./common
+- Safe summary: CSS helper for Hono JSX provides experimental CSS APIs for dynamic styles including css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, rawCssString, minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug
+- Reads as: no external reads (self-contained utilities)
+- Neighbor files: none
+- Safe summary: Common utility file for CSS helper providing shared utilities like class name generation, CSS minification, and template string processing
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, ProxyFetch, HTTPException
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper provides Fetch API wrapper with hop-by-hop header handling and RFC compliance options
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper provides utility functions for inspecting routes and getting router information
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: ../../utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper provides html tag function for templating strings with auto-escaping for HTML content
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text, ../../utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper exports stream, streamSSE, and streamText functions for handling streaming responses including SSE and text streaming
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Core streaming helper provides stream function for pushing data to a writable stream with error handling
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming helper provides streamSSE function for SSE responses with event/message handling
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: ../../context, ./stream
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ./stream
+- Safe summary: Streaming text helper provides streamText function for streaming plain text responses
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: ./accepts
+- Neighbor files: ./accepts
+- Safe summary: Accepts helper exports the accepts function for matching Accept headers
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, Accept
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/accept, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/accept, ../../utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Accepts helper provides accepts function for matching Accept/Content headers with customizable matching logic and default fallback
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: (re-exports types)
+- Reads as: ./types
+- Neighbor files: ./types
+- Safe summary: ConnInfo helper re-exports type definitions for connection i
